articles.title: Refund Policy and Threshold Rules
articles.content: Acme Retail processes refunds automatically for amounts up to Rs.25,000 via the Payments Gateway. Refund requests exceeding Rs.25,000 must be escalated to a human specialist via the CRM. The specialist team has a 24-hour response SLA. Customers must raise refund requests within 30 days of delivery.

articles.title: Return Window Policy
articles.content: Customers may return items within 30 days of delivery. Electronics are eligible for return within 7 days. Items must be unused and in original packaging.

articles.title: Escalation SLA and Specialist Response Times
articles.content: Escalated cases are assigned to a specialist within 2 hours. Specialists respond within 24 hours. High-priority cases (above Rs.25,000) are handled first.

articles.title: Partial Cancellation and Address Update Rules
articles.content: Customers may cancel individual line items from orders in 'placed' or 'processing' status. Shipped or delivered orders require a return request. Address updates are allowed for orders not yet shipped.

articles.title: Payment Methods and Refund Processing Times
articles.content: Supported methods: HDFC Credit, ICICI Debit, SBI Net Banking, UPI, and COD. Refunds reflect within 5 business days of initiation.
